extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: all “By” rows are Nil and excluded; among “Against” rows, the Company has Nil criminal proceedings, 22 tax proceedings, and Nil statutory/regulatory proceedings, while promoters, directors and subsidiaries have Nil in each relevant category. The aggregate amount against the Company is explicitly stated as ₹1,701.04 million; the subsidiaries’ amount is Nil, so the quantified group amount is ₹1,701.04 million, converted from million to crore by dividing by 10, i.e. ₹170.104 crore. Contingent liabilities are taken from the stated consolidated Total of ₹644.79 million as at June 30, 2024, not re-summed, and converted to ₹64.479 crore. The company-wide customer concentration for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2024, is 14.20% for the top five and 23.16% for the top ten, measured as a percentage of revenue from operations. The litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million as the source unit; all crore amounts above use the conversion ₹10 million = ₹1 crore.
